# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <h2>User Comments</h2>
    @foreach($comments as $comment)
        <div class="comment">
            <div class="comment-author">
                <strong>{{ $comment->user->name }}</strong>
            </div>
            <div class="comment-content">
                {!! clean($comment->content) !!}
            </div>
            <div class="comment-meta">
                <small>{{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</small>
            </div>
        </div>
        <hr>
    @endforeach
</div>
@endsection
